title: Koha Hold
description: A hold (reservation) record from the Taylor's Library Koha REST API.

item_type_id.description: Optional itemtype for a record level hold

pickup_library_id.description: Internal library identifier for the pickup library

hold_date.description: The date the hold was placed

cancellation_date.description: The date the hold was cancelled

cancellation_reason.description: The reason the hold was cancelled

waiting_date.description: The date the item was marked as waiting

priority.description: Where in the queue the patron sits

status.description: One letter code defining the hold status after confirmation

item_level.description: If the hold is placed at item level

suspended.description: Controls if the hold is suspended

suspended_until.description: Date until which the hold is suspended

non_priority.description: Set this hold as non priority

lowest_priority.description: Controls if the hold is given lowest priority

timestamp.description: Timestamp for the latest hold update
